title: A fireball splited in two before exploding when it fell in Aracaju-SE [1996]
excerpt: AUG 27th, 1996. Time: 10:30 pm. Duration: not determined. In Aracaju, State of Sergipe, a military observed with the naked eye from the balcony of his house “a ball of fire crossing the sky”. text_preview: AUG 27th, 1996. Time: 10:30 pm. Duration: not determined. In Aracaju, State of Sergipe, a military observed with the naked eye from the balcony of his house “a ball of fire crossing the sky”. According to the witness’s report, the unidentified flying object was round in shape, incandescent, traveling at a “very fast” speed and made a sound only after it passed, “as if it were exploding in the fall”. From the observer’s perspective, the UFO made a “straight path towards the ground”. The report by COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] also informs that: “Another observer who was at a pa
summary: A military witness in Aracaju-SE saw a fast-moving fireball cross the sky and split into two before exploding near the horizon on Aug 27, 1996.
